title: Ychna
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Ychna |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=Long enough to coil around an [[Space station/Legends|orbital city]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*A [[Mouth/Legends|maw]] over 80 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] wide *Body resembling a massive [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]] |lifespan= |origin= |habitat=[[Vacuum/Legends|Vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|What in the galaxy am I looking at?''"
"''That, Commander, is what the Yuuzhan Vong call a yncha [sic]. The one they deployed at Duro practically ate an orbital city.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Garray]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''}} '''Ychna''' were massive, [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]], [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]]-like creatures that had [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]] over eighty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] wide. Long enough to coil around an [[Space station/Legends|orbital city]], ychna were used during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] by the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] Yuuzhan Vong [[Species/Legends|species]] to mainly assault [[Realspace/Legends|space]] stations and other [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] structures. One ychna was [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|deployed]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], where it practically ate the orbital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Orr-Om]]. In the last [[29 ABY/Legends|year]] of the war, another was part of an [[Battle of Caluula|attack]] on [[Caluula Station]]. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|Looks like the creature's got some kind of pouch clinging to its dorsal area. Maybe life-support, over a blowhole.|Jedi Knight Mara Jade Skywalker|}} [[Bioengineering/Legends|Bioengineered]] by the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]],{{CSWECite|III|352|ychna}} ychna were massive creatures that resembled [[Exogorth/Legends|space slugs]]. Ychna possessed a wedge-shaped head with a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] over eighty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in width and had a pouch over its blow hole that clung to its dorsal area, which [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] suspected was for [[Life support/Legends|life support]]. The mouth of the ychna was incredibly powerful and could easily crush the metal used to construct [[Space station/Legends|space stations]]. Ychna also had a thick hide, allowing them to survive in the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], and they had the capacity to suck out every bit of energy that a space station's [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] could produce. Ychna sometimes had to rely on [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]-manipulating [[dovin basal]]s to tow them into position in a vacuum. Despite the creature's immense size, a ychna could be [[Death/Legends|killed]] if a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] was launched into its mouth. ==Behavior== {{Quote|The ychna.''"
"''You know how hard it is to satisfy those things.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his wife, Leia Organa Solo, after Caluula Station shakes|}} Used to attack space stations and other [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] platforms, ychna would gorge on their mechanical targets and fatten themselves until they were bloated; a ychna's hunger was hard to satisfy. They sometimes ripped parts off a station and ate the bits that they had separated from the superstructure. Ychna also occasionally went after enemy [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that flew near them and, while attacking space stations, liked to wrap around the orbital platforms to crush them. ==History== {{Quote|The ychna, our servant in orbit, will destroy any of your other monstrosities that threaten us.|Warmaster Tsavong Lah|}} [[File:Duro_SOF.png|thumb|left|220px|Ychnas were used during the Yuuzhan Vong's attack on Duro (pictured).]] Bioengineered into existence by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' ychna were used by the Yuuzhan Vong in their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] controlled by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The Yuuzhan Vong mainly utilized ychna to help destroy the New Republic's mechanical space stations. For the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]] upon the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] used a ychna to destroy the orbital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Orr-Om]]. Lah also threatened the defenders of Duro that the ychna would destroy them if the Yuuzhan Vong forces were attacked. However, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Solo]] destroyed the ychna by firing a proton torpedo down the monster's throat with his [[T-65XJ X-wing starfighter|X-wing starfighter]], though the Yuuzhan Vong took the planet nonetheless. In the last year of the war, in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' to [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. a ychna was used in an [[Battle of Caluula|attack]] on [[Caluula Station]], which was orbiting the world of [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]]. The ychna took down the station's [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] before rending a hole in the station's exterior, which Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] used to board and overtake the facility. ==Behind the scenes== Ychna first appeared in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'', a [[2000]] novel from [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series, written by [[Kathy Tyers]]. It also later appeared in [[James Luceno]]'s [[2003]] novel, ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'', the final book in the series. Twice within ''The Unifying Force'', ychna is misspelled as "'''yncha'''." ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ychna |es=Ychna }} [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Invertebrates]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong creatures]]
